heading: Omitted
label: 1300b–2 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which prohibited the Secretary from approving plans for the use of money specified in former until at least thirty days after the plans have been submitted by the Secretary to Congressional committees, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 92–467, § 386 Stat. 781section 1300b–1 of this titleOct. 6, 1972
